name: Springtime Quiche
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. In a medium bowl, combine flour and salt; cut in butter until crumbly. Stir in chives and water (mixture will be crumbly).
3. Shape into ball. On lightly floured surface, roll dough into 12-inch circle, about 1/8-inch thick.
4. Fold into quarters; unfold and press firmly against bottom and sides of a 10-inch quiche pan. Flute edges.
5. Spread cheese over bottom of crust; top with chicken. Sprinkle bacon over chicken.
6. Place asparagus spears in spoke pattern on top of bacon.
7. In a small bowl, stir together remaining filling ingredients.
8. Pour filling over chicken mixture.
9. Bake for 40 to 45 minutes or until golden and set in center. Let stand 10 minutes.
